title: Agent chat input component with command picker and attachment support
purpose: Provides a text input area for agent communication with slash command completion, file mention support, and attachment handling capabilities.
module_context: Exports a TurnInput React component that manages user input state, handles keyboard shortcuts, and integrates with agent stores for message history and attachments.

methods.name: computeMentionQuery
methods.normalized_params: (value: string, caret: number): { query: string; start: number } | null

steps.content: Check if the caret position is valid for mention detection.
Search backwards from the caret position to find the nearest '@' character.
Verify that the '@' is preceded by whitespace or is at the start of the string.
Extract the partial path following the '@' character up to the caret position.
Validate that the extracted path contains only word-like characters.
Return the mention query information if valid, otherwise return null.
Update the component's internal text value state.
Update the component's internal caret position state.
Determine if the slash command picker should be open based on whether the input starts with '/'.
Check if the mention picker should be open by analyzing the current text and caret position for valid mention tokens.
Extract the new text value and caret position from the change event.
Update the component state with the new value and caret position.
Reset the message history recall index.
Dynamically adjust the textarea height based on its content.
Extract the current caret position from the selection event.
Determine if the mention picker should be open based on the current text and caret position.
Trim the current input text and check if it's empty or if the component is disabled.
If the input is valid, call the send handler with the trimmed text.
Store the message in the user message history.
Clear the input text and reset the caret position.
Close the slash and mention pickers.
Reset the message history recall index.
Reset the textarea height to its default.
Handle arrow up key press for message history recall.
Handle arrow down key press for navigating forward through message history.
Prevent default behavior for picker navigation keys when either picker is open.
Handle enter key press for sending messages, respecting modifier keys.
Set the input text to the selected slash command name.
Position the caret at the end of the command name.
Close the slash command picker.
Focus the textarea element.
Determine the current mention query based on the input text and caret position.
If no valid mention is found, close the mention picker.
Replace the mention token with the selected file path.
Update the input text with the new content.
Position the caret after the inserted mention.
Close the mention picker.
Focus the textarea and set the caret position.

methods.name: handleAttachmentUpload
methods.normalized_params: (a: { id: string; url: string; mimeType: string; name: string }): void

steps.content: Check if a session ID is available for the attachment.
If session ID exists, add the attachment to the agent store.

methods.name: useAgentShortcuts
methods.normalized_params: ({ onSend; onCancel; onFocus; onSlash; onMention }): void

steps.content: Register keyboard shortcuts for sending messages, canceling, focusing, opening slash commands, and inserting mentions.
